description: The first Friday of February is when we turn those frowns upside down and begin the Give Kids A Smile program. The initiative, created by the American Dentist Association (ADA), is an opportunity for kids who can’t normally afford to see a dentist to get some free dental care. Dentists, as well as dental hygienists, assistants, and other volunteers, use their time and talents to ensure that children are given the dental care they need and deserve all across the country.

designer.description: In addition to my expertise in UI/UX design and Digital Marketing, I possess a strong background in creating strategic pathways that guide users towards their desired goals. With a deep understanding of customer journeys and effective conversion techniques, I excel in designing optimized user experiences that drive engagement and facilitate desired actions. Drawing on 5 years of experience, I leverage my knowledge of user behavior, persuasive design principles, and data-driven insights to create intuitive and seamless pathways that enhance user interactions and improve conversion rates. My ability to conceptualize, design, and implement these strategic frameworks ensures that users have a compelling and frictionless experience, resulting in increased customer satisfaction and business growth.

html_data:
• Home
  • Services
  • Schedule Appointment
  • Gallery
  • Blogs

A child's smile is the heart of heaven

The first Friday of February is when we turn those frowns upside down and begin the Give Kids A Smile program. The initiative, created by the American Dentist Association (ADA), is an opportunity for kids who can’t normally afford to see a dentist to get some free dental care.

Learn More

Give Kids a Smile Day

The event initially started out as a one-day event in February but has since grown into a national event annually. Almost one in four children under five already have cavities and 10 million children under the age of 18 receive no dental care.

Give Kids A Smile remains an important part of the ADA’s Action for Dental Health.

Their mission is to end any dental health problems in America by providing care to everyone, especially those who need it the most.
